title: cynanchum macrophyllum var. nikoense
intro: Cynanchum macrophyllum var. nikoense, also known as Nikko creeper, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Nikko creeper include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exerting potential antiviral effects against herpes simplex virus. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and has been used in traditional East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties.
